node.text:
Talking to Google ✨Astrology Edition✨ There’s a surprise for every star sign.

♈ Aries: “Hey Google, start a meditation”
♉ Taurus: “Hey Google, where’s the closest spa?”
♊ Gemini: “Hey Google, tell me something I don’t know”
♋ Cancer: “Hey Google, tell me a love story”
♌ Leo: “Hey Google, give me a compliment”
♍ Virgo: “Hey Google, make a list called ‘To Do’”
♎ Libra: “Hey Google, tell me a joke”
♏ Scorpio: “Hey Google, what’s your secret?”
♐ Sagittarius: “Hey Google, where is the nearest skydiving place?"
♑ Capricorn: “Hey Google, find a good playlist for me to work to”*
♒ Aquarius: “Hey Google, where can I learn to horseback ride?”
♓ Pisces: “Hey Google, what is the meaning of love?”

*Results may vary based on service and subscription.

#GooglePixelWatch is the first smartwatch built inside and out by Google—and it’s coming this fall 🎉¹

💪 Keep track of your health and fitness goals and progress w/ @Fitbit²
🏡 Control your smart home w/ Google Home for Wear OS³
💰Tap to pay with Google Pay
🗺️ Get turn by turn directions with Google Maps
🗣️ Access Google Assistant, hands-free⁴
🕐 …it also tells time

#GoogleIO

¹Requires an Android 8.0 or newer phone, Google account and internet access. See g.co/pixelwatch/help for more information.
²Some features may require Fitbit account and mobile app.
³Requires a compatible smart device.
⁴Google Assistant and some related features are not available in all languages. See g.co/assistant/languages for updates to language availability.

node.text:
Introducing #PixelBuds Pro 📣🎉

Immerse yourself in sound that adapts to you.

🤫 Block unwanted sounds using Active Noise Cancellation with Silent Seal™
✨ Switch audio automatically between compatible devices¹
🎚️ Keep sound full at any volume with Volume EQ²
⚡ Listen for up to 11 hours or up to 7 with Active Noise Cancellation³
🪟 Let in a bit of the world with Transparency mode
🗣️ Stay hands-free with voice commands for Google Assistant⁴

The 🧠 of Google meets top-tier noise cancellation for $199.

Pre-orders start July 21st

¹Devices must have been previously paired with Pixel Buds Pro.
²To prevent possible hearing damage, avoid listening at high volume for prolonged periods of time.
³All listening times are approximate and were measured using music playback with pre-production hardware and software, with fully charged Pixel Buds Pro and case, and other features disabled (including Active Noise Cancellation). Case is used to recharge Pixel Buds Pro. Charging times are approximate. Use of other features will decrease battery life. Battery life depends on device, features enabled, usage, environment and many other factors. Actual battery life may be lower.
⁴Requires a Google Assistant-enabled Android 6.0 or newer device, Google Account, and an internet connection. Data rates may apply. For available languages and minimum requirements go to g.co/pixelbudspro/help.

node.text:
Introducing the new Google Pixel 6a 🎉

✨ Keep things fast and secure with Google Tensor—the smartphone chip designed by Google
🪄 Make distractions disappear with Magic Eraser on Google Photos¹
🌙 Capture incredible photos even in low light with Night Sight
📸 Photograph people more accurately with Real Tone™
🔋 Stay charged for up to 72 hours² with Extreme Battery Saver

Starting at $449

Pre-orders start July 21

#GoogleIO

¹Requires Google Photos app. Magic Eraser may not work on all image elements.
²Est. battery life based on testing using median Pixel user battery usage profile across a mix of features on Sub-6 GHz non-standalone 5G (ENDC) connectivity. Avg. battery life during testing was approx. 29 hours. Battery life depends upon many factors. Use of certain features will decrease battery life. Actual battery life may be lower.

node.text:
Google #Pixel10a is the real deal, for a real deal. 

📷 Snap extraordinary pics with the best phone camera under $500¹ and a stacked suite of comprehensive editing tools. 
🙌 Relax knowing the Pixel 10a is the most durable Pixel A-series phone yet and 7 years of upgrades keeps it feeling new for a long time.² 
💡 Get ideas about what you’re seeing through live back-and-forth chats with Gemini.³ 
⚡ Take longer breaks from the charging station with more than 30 hours of battery life on a single charge, and up to 120 hours with Extreme Battery saver.⁴ 
🆘 Get emergency help without a signal with Satellite SOS, available on the Pixel A-Series for the first time.⁵ 

You’ll be surprised by how much you get with Google Pixel 10a. Learn more at GoogleStore.com 

¹Among smartphones under $500 (MSRP) in markets where Pixel 10a is sold. Based on third-party evaluation. 
²Your Pixel will generally receive Pixel Drops during the applicable Android update and support periods for the phone. See g.co/pixel/updates for details. Availability of some Pixel Drops may vary by phone and device model. 
³Check responses. Compatibility and availability varies. 18+. 
⁴Battery life depends upon many factors and usage of certain features will decrease battery life. Actual battery life may be lower. Over time, Pixel software will manage battery performance to help maintain battery health as your battery ages. See g.co/pixel/battery-tests and g.co/pixel/batteryhealth for details. 
⁵Restrictions apply. Setup required. Service included at no additional charge for the first two years after activation of devices. Available in the US. Connection and response times vary based on location, site conditions, and other factors. See g.co/pixel/satellitesos for details.

node.text:
Google #PixelWatch 4 is tough around the edges, but designed to be repaired and reloved ❤️ 

Inspired by the timeless quality of mechanical watches, we intentionally redesigned the display and battery replacement process from the inside out – so in the rare case your watch needs maintenance or repairs, you’ll have options for fixing or replacing parts – helping your watch stand the test of time ⚙️🪛

node.text:
Pixelsnap makes wireless charging…a snap ☺️ 

The fact that Google #Pixel10 is the first major Android phone to fully embrace the next generation of wireless charging with Qi2 built in has us… feeling magnetic 🧲

Some BTS from our durability lab so you can see how #Pixel10 and Pixel 10 Pro withstand the test of time—and the test of drops, spills, scratches, and the oopsies in between¹ 🙌 

BTW, each Pixel passes a 1 meter granite drop test 🪨 

¹Designed to comply with dust and water protection rating IP68 under IEC standard 60529 when each device leaves the factory but the device is not water or dust proof. The accessories are not water or dust resistant. Water resistance and dust resistance are not permanent conditions and will diminish or be lost over time due to normal wear and tear, device repair, disassembly or damage. Phone is not drop/tumble proof and dropping your device may result in loss of water/dust resistance. Damage from drops, tumbles, and other external forces are not covered under warranty. Liquid damage voids the warranty. See g.co/pixel/water for details.

Peace of mind meets beautiful design with #NestCam Indoor. 

👀 Get a better view in both orientations with the discrete hinge 

🌺 Bring color to your home with Berry—a bold shade that pays homage to a vibrant bouquet of flowers—or go for a subtler shade with Snow and Hazel 

🏡 Enjoy simple elegance that complements your space 

♻️ Reduce your footprint with 28% recycled plastic materials and 100% plastic-free packaging¹ʹ² 

Experience the beauty of Nest Cam Indoor in your home at GoogleStore.com.

¹Based on product weight (includes in-box accessories). 
²Based on retail packaging (excluding adhesive materials and required plastic stickers) as shipped by Google. To meet the request of some retail partners, stickers and/or security tags are applied to some packaging variations and may contain plastic.

node.text:
Hands-free help from Gemini? All you have to do is ask.¹ 

Use Gemini with #PixelBuds 2a to find 🔎 info from recent emails, get walking directions, and reply to incoming texts just by talking 🗣️ to your buds, no hands required. 

¹Requires pairing with compatible Android device (sold separately) with Gemini mobile app and a Google Account. Internet connection required. Features may differ depending on subscription and account. Some apps require setup. Available in select countries and languages. Check responses for accuracy. Data rates may apply.

You can also ask Gemini to summarize, save key info, and reply to messages all without taking out your phone.

node.text:
Peace of mind 😌 but make it hi-res 👀 with the wired #NestCam Outdoor and Indoor and #NestDoorbell.

Now your video is crisp and clear with 2K HDR, even in low light.¹ʹ² Night vision lets you see in the 🌌 dark —hello possum family²—while Zoom & Crop helps you focus 🔍 on important spots.² And, because you’ll get our widest and tallest field of view yet, almost nothing’s out of frame.³ 

Rest easy night and day and every hour in between and check it out at GoogleStore.com

¹Availability of 2K resolution is dependent on Wi-Fi and network strength, and requires connectivity speed of at least 3.3Mbps.
²Some features, including mobile and browser notifications, remote control, video recording, video streaming and video history, require the Google Home app and working internet and Wi-Fi.
³Compared to earlier Nest Cam and Nest Doorbell models.
